chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-133 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.10.2024 Mr. Parkash Kumar DAG. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. AG Sindh. Mr. Zaheer Abbas Law Officer ECP. ----- None present for the Petitioner. He has challenged the impugned Notification No.DRO/TAY/G.E-2024/1006, Dated 18.01.2024 with regard to Final List of Polling Stations established for the General Elections 2024 in respect of PS-59 Tando Allahyar-II. Since Elections have been held and therefore, DAG and ECP’s Counsel state that the Petition has become infructuous. Even otherwise, the Election Tribunals are functioning. Dismissed having become infructuous. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
